creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

some ports from the "Wanted Ports" page of the FreeBSD wiki can be removed/updated to help committers/contributors to avoid wasted efforts on projects that were already started by someone else (and maybe reduces duplicate bug reports, too).

Ports that can be removed from the wiki page because they landed into the ports tree:

- anydesk -> since 2018-03-26 (see also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226679)
- mod_pagespeed -> since 2011-10-08
- Nestopia -> since 2016-01-19 (see also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=206311)
- s-tui -> since 2018-04-14 (see also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=227504)
- Veracrypt -> since 2017-07-19


Ports that can be marked as WIP (or similar):

- Netbox -> WIP (see also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=227416)
- Plasma -> WIP (see also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=225669)
